prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年山东省综合类最低位次分别为约21721→22827→29216→31515→30395名，整体呈明显后移趋势，2023年起位次跃升至29000+区间，2024年达到峰值31515 名后2025年小幅回升至30395名，近3年累计后移约7500名，波动幅度较大；该校在山东省综合类招生计划2021–2022年均为131人，2023年略降至125人，2024–20 25年增至146人；2026年计划152人，较2025年增加6人（+4.1%），连续两年小幅扩招，对竞争有一定缓解作用但幅度有限。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 东北大学秦皇岛分校为985工 程、211工程、双一流建设高校，软科中国大学排名以东北大学名义位列2026年第38名（2025年第37名），学校层次较高，对考生有较强吸引力；2026年声誉评 价为中性/混合，主要涉及校区身份认知（秦皇岛校区通过在校名中使用校区二字消除隔离感）；抖音热度排名第82位，评价为一般，短视频曝光量处于中等水平；未见明显投档 断档或录取异常记录；依托东北大学学科体系，控制科学与工程A+、计算机科学与技术A、冶金工程A、机械工程A-、材料科学与工程A-、软件工程A-，其中控制 科学与工程和计算机科学与技术为顶尖学科，对工科考生吸引力较强。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程等该校主要招生专业大类社会热度持续偏高 （2026年计算机类仍为高热推荐）；山东省2026年考生总数约720000人，较2025年681127人增长约5.7%，竞争加剧；该校校本部位于河北省秦皇岛市，在山东省招生占比约5.6%-6.4%（2025年146人/全国2602人），属于该校主要生源省份之一，山东省考生对该校认可度较高。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次整体后移趋势、2026年招生计划小幅扩招（+4.1%）、山东省考生总数明显增加（+5.7%）以及计算机/电子信息等热门专业持续高热，预计2026年竞争较202 5年略有加剧；预测最低位次约31194名，区间30694–31694名。

major_tier_recommendation.tier_1:
一档（最难进）
- 计算机科学与技术
- 自动化类（自动化、电气工程及其自动化）
- 物联网工程
major_tier_recommendation.tier_2:
二档（中等）
- 电子信息工程/通信工程
- 数学类（数学与应用数学、应用统计学、数据科学与大数据技术）
- 机械电子工程/机械类
- 仪器类（智能光电感知）
major_tier_recommendation.tier_3:
三档（相对好进）
- 经济学类（经济学、金融学、国际经济与贸易）
- 工商管理类（工商管理、会计学、健康服务与管理）
- 材料类（材料成型及控制工程、材料科学与工程等）
- 外国语言文学类（英语、日语）
major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 位次在预测区间30694–31694名内，建议以二档专业为主攻方向、一档王牌专业（计算机/自动化）作为冲刺、三档专业作为保底；位次明显优于区间下限（如30000名以内）可重 点冲击一档专业；位次接近区间上限（31600名以上）建议以二档为主、三档保底。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for comprehensive subjects in Shandong Province were approximately 21721 → 22827 → 29216 → 31515 → 30395, showing a clear overall backward trend. Since 2023, rankings have jumped to the 29000+ range, peaking at 31515 in 2024 before slightly recovering to 30395 in 2025, with a cumulative backward shift of about 7500 positions over the past three years and significant fluctuations. The enrollment plan for comprehensive subjects in Shandong was 131 students in both 2021 and 2022, slightly decreasing to 125 in 2023, then increasing to 146 in 2024–2025. The 2026 plan is 152 students, an increase of 6 (+4.1%) compared to 2025, with two consecutive years of slight expansion, which somewhat alleviates competition but to a limited extent.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Northeastern University at Qinhuangdao is a 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class university. In the Soft Science China University Rankings, it ranks 38th in 2026 (37th in 2025) under the name of Northeastern University. The university has a high level and strong appeal to candidates. The 2026 reputation evaluation is neutral/mixed, mainly involving campus identity perception (the Qinhuangdao campus eliminates the sense of isolation by using 'campus' in its name). Douyin popularity ranks 82nd, rated as average, with moderate short video exposure. No obvious admission gaps or abnormal records have been observed. Relying on Northeastern University's discipline system, it has A+ in Control Science and Engineering, A in Computer Science and Technology, A in Metallurgical Engineering, A- in Mechanical Engineering, A- in Materials Science and Engineering, and A- in Software Engineering, with Control Science and Engineering and Computer Science and Technology being top-tier disciplines, strongly attracting engineering candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Major enrollment categories such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering continue to have high social popularity (Computer Science remains a highly recommended major in 2026). The total number of candidates in Shandong Province in 2026 is approximately 720,000, an increase of about 5.7% from 681,127 in 2025, intensifying competition. The main campus is located in Qinhuangdao, Hebei Province, with enrollment in Shandong accounting for about 5.6%-6.4% (146 out of 2602 nationally in 2025), making it one of the main source provinces, and Shandong candidates have a high recognition of the university.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the overall backward trend of historical rankings, the slight expansion of the 2026 enrollment plan (+4.1%), the significant increase in the total number of candidates in Shandong (+5.7%), and the continued high popularity of hot majors like Computer Science and Electronic Information, competition in 2026 is expected to be slightly more intense than in 2025. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 31194, with a range of 30694–31694.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Competitive)
- Computer Science and Technology
- Automation (Automation, Electrical Engineering and Automation)
- Internet of Things Engineering
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Moderate)
- Electronic Information Engineering/Communication Engineering
- Mathematics (Mathematics and Applied Mathematics, Applied Statistics, Data Science and Big Data Technology)
- Mechatronic Engineering/Mechanical Engineering
- Instrumentation (Intelligent Optoelectronic Perception)
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
- Economics (Economics, Finance, International Economics and Trade)
- Business Administration (Business Administration, Accounting, Health Service and Management)
- Materials (Material Forming and Control Engineering, Materials Science and Engineering, etc.)
- Foreign Languages and Literature (English, Japanese)
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 30694–31694, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main direction, aim for Tier 1 flagship majors (Computer Science/Automation) as a stretch, and use Tier 3 majors as a safety net. If your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit (e.g., within 30000), you can focus on challenging Tier 1 majors. If your ranking is near the upper limit (above 31600), it is advisable to prioritize Tier 2 majors with Tier 3 as a backup.
